title: Credit Fraud Detection
overview: I developed this project with my team during a 48-hour hackathon as an investor-ready pitch deck without further technical development.
development: It proposes a Quantum Kernel Support Vector Machine (QSVM) to tackle the global credit card fraud crisis by encoding transactions into quantum states and using least-squares optimized observables.
result: This approach achieved a significant 80% accuracy gain over classical models, reaching a robust 0.92 accuracy to enhance bank stability and minimize costs.
